Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1405.jpg', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Kuroro Coffee', 2: 'Babylonia', 4: 'Orbital Corridor'}
{2: 'Babylonia, Orbital Corridor, Kuroro Coffee.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The pink-haired girl sits at a table by the coffee shop, waiting for someone.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg'}
{3: 'Her gaze travels past the greenery beside her to the azure planet in the distance.'}
{3: 'One can gaze past where Earth\'s edge melts into the darkness, and look into the void to find stars glittering beyond.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, you recall a photograph you once saw back at F.O.S. College.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory334.png'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront63.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.5', 5: '0'}
{3: 'It was a photograph from 1984, showing an astronaut floating untethered in space. Beneath him was the azure, pristine Earth, while behind him stretched boundless darkness.'}
{3: 'Rumor has it that this astronaut has seen Earth breathing.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1405.jpg'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Standing on the spiral staircase, you unconsciously slow your pace. In your line of sight, three elements frame a perfect composition: the girl sipping her tea, the breathing Earth, and the vast expanse of the universe beyond.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryQujingkuang.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Raising the camera, adjusting the angle...'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryQujingkuang.prefab'}
{3: 'Click—'}
{3: 'The soft click of the shutter startles the girl, who tilts her head to look at you.'}

{3: 'With just a glance, the girl instantly understands what you have done. As thoughts flicker through her mind, a mischievous smile curves at the corner of her lips—she is clearly ready for some "mischief."'}
{3: 'The girl turns slightly, facing you in the distance. She crosses her left leg over her right and folds her arms across her chest with mock anger.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Why are you just standing there like a fool? I\'ve been waiting for you for thirteen minutes.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'So, this is what you asked me out for?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After you explain the World Government Association of Art\'s event to Teddy, she displays a somewhat disappointed expression.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Hmm... the World Government Association of Art always comes up with these kinds of activities.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After taking a sip of her red tea, Teddy leans back in her chair and contemplates quietly. A moment later, a mischievous smile plays across her lips.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Sure thing, but in exchange, you\'ll have to do me a favor later.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Deal.', 3: '64', 4: 'As long as it\'s nothing too unreasonable.', 5: '69'}
{2: 'You\'re not plotting something devious, are you?', 3: '67'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Tch, of course not. Not at all.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That depends on how you define "unreasonable."', 4: '1'}
{2: '...I\'m starting to regret this already.', 3: '71'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Too late for regrets now!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Teddy stands up, her face wearing the smug expression of someone who\'s just pulled off the perfect prank.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Well then, for our first stop, you\'re coming with me to shop for a camera.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'The World Government Association of Art already gave me a camera.', 3: '78'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Since this is a special occasion, why not try something with a different style?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1406.jpg', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Two hours later, you follow Teddy out of an elegantly decorated vintage shop, where she\'s now holding a film camera in her hands.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Digital cameras are always producing photos that are overly "clear." They lack that special vibe.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She loads the film into the camera with practiced hands.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Film is unforgiving—each roll only gives you so many shots. That\'s why every press of the shutter matters a lot.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Like this—take two steps back, face to your left, and don\'t move, got it?', 4: '1'}
{2: '(Follow Teddy\'s instructions.)', 3: '90'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'She raises her camera, presses the shutter—click—then mumbles something under her breath.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Hmm... Your expression looks a bit silly, but I suppose it\'s cute enough.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 4: '1'}
{3: 'For the rest of the photo shoot, Teddy takes complete control.'}
{3: 'You follow Teddy across the Dreamglow Gardens, through the Knowledge Promenade, and beyond... At each location, she insists on using an entire roll of film.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory299.png', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Inside the library, Teddy directs you to stand between two towering bookshelves.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Grab a book—any book—pull it out and flip through a few pages.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab'}
{3: 'After taking two shots, she suddenly frowns.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Something still feels missing... Hmm, how about a close-up from a special angle?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{3: 'Without waiting for your consent, Teddy takes your hand and pulls you into a chair. She positions herself behind you, leaning down to find the perfect angle.'}
{3: 'A strand of her hair falls, gently brushing against your arm. Her breathing becomes distinctly audible.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Don\'t move. You\'re a model, do your job.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'Teddy\'s words float from just behind your ear, and you can sense her mischievous smirk.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'Just as you\'re about to turn and say something, the shutter clicks. With the satisfaction brought by a successful prank, she swiftly stands up.'}
{1: '0', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{1: '0', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest03.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Hmm, I like this photo.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1405.jpg', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After winding your way through the photo shoot, you return once again to Kuroro Coffee.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'There\'s only one last frame left on the roll.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'But doesn\'t that mean you can\'t see how the photos turn out at all?', 3: '146'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That\'s exactly what makes film photography so fun.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I\'m going to grab some more sugar cubes from the counter. Do you need anything?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'No, thanks.', 3: '150', 4: 'A napkin would be nice.', 5: '150'}
{3: 'Teddy stands up and walks toward the counter, but doesn\'t pick up anything.'}
{3: 'Instead, she raises her camera and gently presses the shutter, capturing you against the backdrop of the azure planet and the vast starry cosmos.'}
{3: 'Click—'}
{3: 'Startled by the soft click of the shutter, you tilt your head to look at Teddy.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Only to find Teddy smiling, holding up her film camera.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Fair\'s fair.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I won\'t be sending it to the World Government Association of Art—I\'m keeping this one for myself as payment.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'No objections allowed—you promised me, remember?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Her smile is different this time—open and sincere. Beneath the vast cosmic tapestry, a fleeting moment between the two of you is forever preserved.'}
